name: Armenian Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 - 3 cups eggplant, cubed (no need to peel; consider peeling next time)
1 1/2 cup tomato, chopped (fresh or canned; discard tough stem area)
1/4 tsp cayenne or crushed red pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lentils in a large soup or stock pot with a cover.
a. Rinse lentils and bring to a boil in stock.
b. Reduce heat and simmer, covered for 20 minutes (prepare and cook veggies during this time).
c. Add chopped apricots and simmer another 20 minutes.
2. Cook veggies in a large frying pan with a cover.
a. Sauté onion in water or stock until translucent.
b. Add eggplant and about 4 tbsp water; stir and cover. Cook on low temp until almost tender.
c. Add tomato, green pepper, cinnamon, allspice, cayenne, paprika, and salt. Stir.
d. Cook covered another 10 minutes or until veggies are tender.
3. Mix veggies into lentils and simmer, covered for about 15 minutes.
4. Serve soup with parsley and mint stirred into each individual bowl to store unconsumed soup.
